rationale: The cited paper develops an online consumer search mapping method (asymmetric MDS/product-search maps), and the citing paper likewise builds market-structure maps from online search clickstreams and positions itself against prior single-location mapping approaches. Given this strong methodological and conceptual overlap in search-based mapping, this citation is plausibly foundational or method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only DOI-level match evidence is available.
